description: A whole life policyholder wants to know the current cash value of their policy.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent securely verifies the customer's identity.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the current cash value from the policy administration system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully finds the current cash value amount.

nodes.task_description: Communicate the cash value to the policyholder.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly states the current cash value.
